name: Compute DVM
label: Compute DVM
description: A programmable, caching DVM (NIP-90) that runs whitelisted Nostr code snippets (NIP-C0) in a sandbox and publishes cached results.

requiredConfig.name: DVM relay url
requiredConfig.description: relay the worker listens on for jobs and publishes results/caches to (e.g. wss://relay.example.com)

requiredConfig.name: signing key (nsec or hex)
requiredConfig.description: the worker's nostr secret key used to sign results

requiredConfig.name: source relays
requiredConfig.description: comma-separated relays scripts pull data from (defaults to the dvm relay)

requiredConfig.name: allowed script authors (hex)
requiredConfig.description: comma-separated hex pubkeys whose code snippets may run. empty = any (not recommended)

requiredConfig.name: allowed requesters (hex)
requiredConfig.description: comma-separated hex pubkeys allowed to submit jobs. empty = anyone

requiredConfig.name: max runtime per script (ms)
requiredConfig.description: wall-clock budget for a single script run

requiredConfig.name: max memory per script (mb)
requiredConfig.description: memory cap for a single script run

requiredConfig.name: max concurrent scripts
requiredConfig.description: how many scripts may run at once; the rest queue
